rules.rule: Failing test commits must use the format: [Test Name] -> FAIL.
Passing implementation commits must use the format: [Test Name] -> PASS.
Non-TDD commits must follow the format: [CATEGORY]: [Description Of Work Completed].
[CATEGORY] must always be in CAPS and taken from the approved category list.
[Description Of Work Completed] must be written in Pascal Case.
TDD commit messages must not use the [CATEGORY]: [Description] format.
The category in a non-TDD commit must not be lowercase or mixed-case.
Commit descriptions must not be vague (fix, update, changes, wip without context are forbidden).
